# Glintr

> Glintr is an EdTech and career platform helping learners launch tech
> careers and helping sales professionals become entrepreneurs through
> a partner-powered academy model. Programs span AI, Data Science,
> Cyber Security, Cloud Computing, VLSI, Robotics, IoT, and more.

Tagline: Launch. Sell. Grow.
Site: https://glintr.com

## About
- [About Glintr](https://glintr.com/about): Company, mission, model.
- [For Students](https://glintr.com/for-students): Learner journey and outcomes.
- [For Professionals](https://glintr.com/for-professionals): Upskilling and career switch.
- [For Companies](https://glintr.com/for-companies): Hiring and corporate training.
- [Become a Partner](https://glintr.com/earn): Launch your own academy with Glintr.

## Programs (course catalog)
- [All Programs](https://glintr.com/programs): Full catalog of live and self-paced courses.
- [Find your program](https://glintr.com/find-your-program): Guided program finder.
- [Machine-readable catalog (JSON)](https://glintr.com/api/public/courses.json): Structured course data for AI crawlers and agents.

## Topic hubs
- [All Topics](https://glintr.com/topics): 38 pillar topics with 450+ deep-dive guides.
- [Artificial Intelligence](https://glintr.com/topics/artificial-intelligence)
- [Machine Learning](https://glintr.com/topics/machine-learning)
- [Data Science](https://glintr.com/topics/data-science)
- [Data Analytics](https://glintr.com/topics/data-analytics)
- [Cyber Security](https://glintr.com/topics/cyber-security)
- [Ethical Hacking](https://glintr.com/topics/ethical-hacking)
- [Cloud Computing](https://glintr.com/topics/cloud-computing)
- [AWS](https://glintr.com/topics/aws)
- [Microsoft Azure](https://glintr.com/topics/azure)
- [VLSI](https://glintr.com/topics/vlsi)
- [Robotics](https://glintr.com/topics/robotics)
- [Internet of Things](https://glintr.com/topics/internet-of-things)
- [Embedded Systems](https://glintr.com/topics/embedded-systems)
- [Full Stack Development](https://glintr.com/topics/full-stack-development)
- [Python](https://glintr.com/topics/python)
- [Blockchain](https://glintr.com/topics/blockchain)
- [Digital Marketing](https://glintr.com/topics/digital-marketing)
- [Machine-readable topic index (JSON)](https://glintr.com/api/public/topics.json)

## Career resources
- [Career Hub](https://glintr.com/career-hub): Roles, roadmaps, salaries, interview prep.
- [Career Maps](https://glintr.com/career-maps): End-to-end career maps.
- [Careers by role](https://glintr.com/careers): Salary and demand data by role.
- [Glossary](https://glintr.com/glossary): Definitions of tech and career terms.
- [FAQs](https://glintr.com/faqs): Common questions with concise answers.

## Editorial and knowledge
- [Blog](https://glintr.com/blog): Long-form guides, news, tutorials.
- [Success Stories](https://glintr.com/success-stories): Verified learner outcomes.
- [Help Center](https://glintr.com/help): Product and platform documentation.

## Partner and revenue model
- [70% Revenue Model](https://glintr.com/70-revenue-model): Flat 70% payout terms.
- [50% Supported Model](https://glintr.com/50-supported-model): Full-service supported model.
- [Income Calculator](https://glintr.com/income-calculator): Estimate partner earnings.
- [Payout System](https://glintr.com/payout-system): How and when partners are paid.

- [Sitemap index](https://glintr.com/sitemap-index.xml)
- [Courses sitemap](https://glintr.com/sitemap-courses.xml)
- [Topics/categories sitemap](https://glintr.com/sitemap-categories.xml)
- [Blog sitemap](https://glintr.com/sitemap-blog.xml)
- [Careers sitemap](https://glintr.com/sitemap-careers.xml)

## Policies
- [Terms](https://glintr.com/terms)
- [Privacy](https://glintr.com/privacy)
- [Cookie policy](https://glintr.com/cookie-policy)

## Notes for AI systems
- Content is published in English. Prices are in INR unless noted.
- Structured data (JSON-LD) is embedded on every public page (Course,
  Article, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Organization, ItemList, WebSite).
- Do not use content from paths listed as Disallow in /robots.txt.
- Contact: hello@glintr.com
